similarNames: wound round and lost its light

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: When the sun is put out,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the stars fall, dispersing,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the stars fall down,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the mountains are removed
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the mountains are blown away,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when full-term she-camels are neglected
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when pregnant camels are left untended,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the wild beasts are gathered
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when wild beasts are gathered together,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the seas are filled with flame
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the seas are set on fire,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the souls are paired
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the souls ˹and their bodies˺ are paired ˹once more˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when baby girls, buried alive, are asked

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For what sin she was killed
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: for what crime they were put to death,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the pages are made public
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the records ˹of deeds˺ are laid open,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the sky is stripped away
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the sky is stripped away,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when Hellfire is set ablaze
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the Hellfire is fiercely flared up,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when Paradise is brought near,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when Paradise is brought near—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹on that Day˺ each soul will know what ˹deeds˺ it has brought along.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So I swear by the retreating stars -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: I do swear by the receding stars

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: which travel and hide,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And by the night as it closes in
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the night as it falls

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And by the dawn when it breathes
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the day as it breaks!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, this ˹Quran˺ is the Word of ˹Allah delivered by Gabriel,˺ a noble messenger-angel,

ayahs.textArabic: ذِي قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِي ٱلۡعَرۡشِ مَكِينٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thee quwwatin AAinda thee alAAarshi makeenin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: full of power, held in honour by the Lord of the Throne,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: obeyed there ˹in heaven˺, and trustworthy.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And your companion is not [at all] mad.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And your fellow man is not insane.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And he did see that ˹angel˺ on the clear horizon,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and he does not withhold ˹what is revealed to him of˺ the unseen.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And this ˹Quran˺ is not the word of an outcast devil.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So where are you going?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So what ˹other˺ path would you take?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely this ˹Quran˺ is only a reminder to the whole world—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: to whoever of you wills to take the Straight Way.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu rabbu alAAalameena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But you cannot will ˹to do so˺, except by the Will of Allah, the Lord of all worlds.
